rationale: Review 2's fixes (remove redundant change+defeq let u in antipode_comp; refactor ext/induction/simp and final simp chain into named steps) directly improve robustness and readability of non-obvious core proofs in the diff; Review 1 only partially addresses the simpa and change but misses the map_* and comul issues, so its resulting PR retains more fragile automation and hacky defeq reliance.
